title: chrysanthemum procumbens
intro: Chrysanthemum procumbens is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum procumbens include reducing inflammation, alleviating allergies, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
